title: Taproot Annex
description: The annex is an optional witness element committed by Taproot signatures but ignored by script execution. It provides forward-compatibility space for future soft-fork semantics.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Annex
resources.notes: Practical review of annex behavior and implementation context.

resources.title: BIP 341: Taproot
resources.notes: Formal definition of annex commitment rules in Taproot spends.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Script and witness structure background for Taproot-era spending.
